entities.name: WORLD
entities.description: The global environment encompassing all countries and populations

entities.name: RURAL AREA
entities.description: Geographic regions outside of urban centers where poor populations reside

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOAL
entities.description: Global goals emphasizing the end of poverty and hunger by 2030

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of deprivation that the Sustainable Development Goals aim to end

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A state of food insecurity that the Sustainable Development Goals aim to end

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming, critical for economy, employment, and food security

entities.name: ECONOMY
entities.description: The system of production and consumption of goods and services

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: The state of having paid work, influenced by agriculture

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NATIONAL SELF-RELIANCE
entities.description: The ability of a nation to sustain itself without external aid

entities.name: GENERAL WELL-BEING
entities.description: The overall state of health and happiness of a population

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: The collection and analysis of numerical data related to agriculture

entities.name: AGRICULTURE DATA
entities.description: Information regarding agricultural holdings, land use, and labor force

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL COMMODITY MARKETS
entities.description: Markets for the trade of agricultural products

entities.name: POLICIES
entities.description: Governmental strategies and guidelines for economic and agricultural management

entities.name: PRICE SUPPORTS
entities.description: Government interventions to maintain minimum prices for agricultural products

entities.name: ECONOMIC GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the production of economic goods and services
